meta.note: Unit and integration results are from live Vitest execution. E2E, accessibility, performance, and security results are from static code analysis and simulated execution — marked with analysis_method: static.

summary.coverage_note: Existing 88 tests cover core data layer and SearchPage integration. LandingPage, ThemeToggle, useTheme, and resolveCardImage have no dedicated test files — estimated 72% of new/modified lines covered. No --coverage instrumentation was active.

performance.lcp_status: pass (static analysis: LandingPage makes no fetch calls, no card data on mount)
performance.note: No k6 load test applicable — static SPA with no backend. Lighthouse not run.

owasp_checks.notes: No access-controlled routes or auth. Static SPA — not applicable.
No sensitive data stored. Only `optcg-theme` persisted in localStorage.
No innerHTML or dangerouslySetInnerHTML in new components. Query param values passed through React state — no direct DOM injection.

Anti-flash inline script in index.html accesses localStorage without try/catch in a browser context — however readStored() in useTheme.ts does guard it. The inline script does not guard against localStorage access errors in strict private browsing. Low risk for a public static app.
No new dependencies added per ADR-1. Existing packages not audited in this QA cycle.

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: localStorage value validated in readStored() — invalid values default to 'system'. No JSON.parse on user input.

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No client-side error logging added. Not in scope per ADR-1.
No server-side component. Static SPA — not applicable.

test_cases.description: useTheme initialises from localStorage
test_cases.notes: No useTheme unit test file exists. Static analysis confirms readStored() correctly validates stored value.

test_cases.description: useTheme defaults to system when no stored value
test_cases.notes: No useTheme unit test file exists. Logic verified via code review.

test_cases.description: useTheme.setTheme writes localStorage
test_cases.notes: No useTheme unit test file exists. setTheme() calls localStorage.setItem confirmed in source.

test_cases.description: useTheme.toggleTheme cycles system→light→dark→system
test_cases.notes: No useTheme unit test file exists. CYCLE constant and indexOf logic verified statically.

test_cases.description: resolveCardImage returns path unchanged when no CDN
test_cases.notes: Verified by code review: !CDN returns imagePath as-is.

test_cases.description: resolveCardImage replaces prefix when CDN set
test_cases.notes: Verified by code review: replace(/^\/images\/optcg\//, CDN + '/') logic correct.

test_cases.description: LandingPage form navigates to /search?q=Luffy
test_cases.notes: handleSubmit calls navigate with encodeURIComponent(q). Static analysis pass.

test_cases.description: LandingPage form navigates to /search on empty submit
test_cases.notes: Empty-string after trim() navigates to '/search' with no q param. Static analysis pass.

test_cases.description: LandingPage does not call loadCards or setQuery
test_cases.notes: No useCardStore import in LandingPage.tsx. Confirmed via code review.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle aria-label reflects current theme
test_cases.notes: buildAriaLabel() produces 'Theme: System. Click to cycle theme.' for theme='system'. Static analysis pass.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle shows light_mode icon when resolvedTheme=light
test_cases.notes: ICON['light'] = 'light_mode'. Confirmed in source.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle shows dark_mode icon when resolvedTheme=dark
test_cases.notes: ICON['dark'] = 'dark_mode'. Confirmed in source.

test_cases.description: Route / renders LandingPage
test_cases.notes: App.tsx: <Route path='/' element={<LandingPage />} />. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: Route /search renders SearchPage
test_cases.notes: App.tsx: <Route path='/search' element={<SearchPage />} />. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: Route /cards redirects to /search
test_cases.notes: App.tsx: <Navigate to='/search' replace />. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: Route * redirects to /
test_cases.notes: App.tsx: <Navigate to='/' replace />. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: SearchPage loads skeleton then card grid
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'shows loading skeleton then card grid after data loads'.

test_cases.description: ResultsCount shows 'Showing N of M cards'
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'shows ResultsCount after loading'.

test_cases.description: ResultsCount shows 'No cards found' on zero results
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'shows No cards found when search matches nothing'.

test_cases.description: Color filter narrows results
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'clicking color chip narrows results'.

test_cases.description: Clear all filters restores full set
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'clearing all filters restores full result set'.

test_cases.description: Card detail modal opens on card click
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'clicking a card opens the detail modal'.

test_cases.description: SearchPage error state shows retry button
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'shows retry button when data fetch fails'.

test_cases.description: View toggle switches to list view
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'switching to list view renders list items'.

test_cases.description: Search from landing navigates to results with query
test_cases.notes: LandingPage handleSubmit + App.tsx routing verified. SearchPage reads q param via useCardUrlSync on mount.

test_cases.description: Bookmarkable URL /search?q=Luffy&color=Red loads filtered
test_cases.notes: useCardUrlSync reads all params on mount — unchanged from pre-redesign. Static analysis pass.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle persists dark mode across page load
test_cases.notes: index.html inline script reads localStorage before React hydrates. useTheme reads same key on mount. Chain verified statically.

test_cases.description: Navigate back to landing from SearchPage
test_cases.notes: SearchPage.tsx header contains OPTCG logo text but no explicit <Link to='/'>. US-5.1 acceptance criterion not fully met — filed as BUG-001 Medium.

test_cases.description: LandingPage search input has label for screen readers
test_cases.notes: SR-only <label htmlFor='landing-search'> confirmed in LandingPage.tsx line 90.

test_cases.description: FilterPanel toggle button has aria-expanded
test_cases.notes: FilterPanel.tsx line 36: aria-expanded={isOpen}. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: ViewToggle buttons have aria-pressed
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'view toggle buttons have aria-pressed attributes'.

test_cases.description: ResultsCount has aria-live='polite'
test_cases.notes: Covered by CardSearchPage.test.tsx: 'results count has aria-live region'.

test_cases.description: CardDetailModal close button has aria-label
test_cases.notes: CardDetailModal.tsx line 93: aria-label='Close card detail'. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: Modal focus trap: Tab wraps, Escape closes
test_cases.notes: Modal.tsx implements full focus trap with Tab/Shift+Tab cycling and Escape handler. Verified statically.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle focus ring uses gold
test_cases.notes: ThemeToggle.tsx: focus-visible:ring-optcg-gold applied. Gold = #D4A843. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: LandingPage makes no fetch calls on mount
test_cases.notes: LandingPage has no useEffect, no loadCards, no useCardStore. Static analysis pass.

test_cases.description: JS bundle gzip < 200 kB
test_cases.notes: Build output: 95.94 kB gzip. Budget 200 kB. Pass.

test_cases.description: optcg-theme localStorage value validated before use
test_cases.notes: readStored() accepts only 'light'|'dark'|'system', returns 'system' for any other value. Confirmed.

test_cases.description: No innerHTML or dangerouslySetInnerHTML in new components
test_cases.notes: Code review of LandingPage.tsx, ThemeToggle.tsx, SearchPage.tsx, useTheme.ts: zero unsafe HTML insertion.

test_cases.description: Anti-flash script has no external dependencies
test_cases.notes: index.html inline script: only localStorage.getItem and window.matchMedia used. No script src, no network calls.
